description_long: This bathtub features a rectangular, boxy design with a rich, dark wood exterior finish that gives it a modern and luxurious appearance. The interior is a smooth, glossy white surface, likely made of acrylic or porcelain, providing a clean and inviting bathing space. The rim is flat and wide, with a visible faucet and control knobs mounted on one end, suggesting easy access for filling the tub. The bathtub's sides are straight and unadorned, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. The drainage hole is clearly visible at the base of the interior, ensuring efficient water removal. There are no visible decorative elements or branding on the exterior, maintaining a sleek and contemporary look.
description: A modern rectangular bathtub with a dark wood exterior and a smooth white interior, featuring a faucet and visible drainage hole. Its minimalist design and clean lines give it a luxurious, contemporary feel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat wood panel exterior and the white interior with the drainage hole visible at the back.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated wood panel exterior and the faucet with control knobs on the left end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wood panel exterior and the white interior, with the faucet and controls visible at the far end.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wood panel exterior and the absence of fixtures on this side.
